name: read-post
description: Read data from a POST request

scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://api.localhost -o dist/api.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://api.localhost -o dist/api.wasm
